releaseFacts.title: GoalOS AGIALPHA Ascension v4.4.0 — Ethereum Mainnet Deployment
releaseFacts.claimBoundary: This public UI is read-only and educational. It does not request wallets, move funds, approve tokens, broadcast transactions, provide legal/investment advice, or authorize production use.

contracts.name: CommercializationPerformanceVault
contracts.description: Receives and tracks commercialization-performance capital as a vault rail.
contracts.sourceStatus: Publicly verified on Etherscan per v4.4.0 pre-release record
contracts.productionBoundary: Configured on Ethereum Mainnet; not a production activation, user-fund authorization, or external-audit claim.

contracts.name: ProofRewardsVault
